subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! This is a Day wherein We bid patience itself to be patient in the Cause of its Lord, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه هذا یوم نامر الصبر بان یصبر فی امر ربه العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
